headline: Major Studios Shave Film Slate Costs By 2.8% To Help Boost Profit By 36.8%
summary: The major studios released 97 films in theaters in 2025, the largest number since the COVID-19 pandemic; however, 19 of those films were re-releases, and the other 78 were new films.
